hooks.command: jq '(.tool_input.url // "") as $url | ($url | ltrimstr("https://") | ltrimstr("http://") | split("/")[0] | ltrimstr("www.")) as $host | if ($host == "x.com" or $host == "twitter.com" or $host == "linkedin.com") then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"WebFetch cannot see login-walled content (x.com/twitter.com/linkedin.com). Use mcp__claude-in-chrome__* (Chrome extension) instead. Chrome ops count as writes -- acquire runs/.lock first, release after, never run two Chrome tasks in parallel. Full rule: AGENT-GUIDE.md section \"Login-walled content\"; lock rule: CLAUDE.md section \"Single-writer rule\"."}} else empty end'
